description: A well-formed deployment should not trip high-severity checks.

manifests.content:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: ok
spec:
  template:
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: app
        image: ghcr.io/acme/app:v1.2.3
        resources:
          requests: { cpu: 100m, memory: 128Mi }
          limits:   { cpu: 500m, memory: 512Mi }
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet: { path: /health, port: 8080 }
